case_title: ASSEEM GUPTA VS. WESTLET AIRLINES, LTD.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-06-2020, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WESTLET AIRLINES, LTD.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF ASSEEM GUPTA IS NOT PRESENT. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT WESTLET AIRLINES, LTD REPRESENTED BY JUANA NOYOLA. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

REMARK: REMARK: EXHIBITS DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO ON NOVEMBER 8, 2024 PURSUANT TO SECTION 1952 OF THE CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE OF CALIFORNIA.
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE / ZOOM (MAY-10-21 HEARING) (REQUEST TO APPEAR BY ZOOM FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) FILED BY DEFENDANT WESTLET AIRLINES, LTD.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-10-2021 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO AUG-06-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ASSEEM GUPTA IS PRESENT BY UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM APPEARANCE. DEFENDANT WESTLET AIRLINES IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM APPEARANCE REPRESENTED BY JUANA NOYOLA. PLAINTIFF IS ALLOWED A CONTINUANCE TO SUBMIT A TIMELY ZOOM APPEARANCE REQUEST. PLAINTIFF WILL SEND IN A DECLARATION OF ADDRESS UPDATE (SEE MAILING). DEFENDANT NEED NOT SUBMIT ANOTHER ZOOM REQUEST, DEFENDANT MUST CONFIRM RECEIPT OF EXHIBITS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
